name: caldir
description: Çaldır! - İnternetsiz güvenli telefon kontrol (yerel WiFi)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @caldir/shared && npm run build -w @caldir/server && npm run build -w @caldir/app && npm run build -w @caldir/test
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @caldir/shared && npm run typecheck -w @caldir/server && npm run typecheck -w @caldir/app && npm run typecheck -w @caldir/test
